sources: shared paper pool from approved search output
dataset_plan.sampling_strategy: Assign participants to experimental conditions while keeping paper pool composition fixed.

procedure: Prepare a shared paper pool for all participants.
Assign participants to structured or unstructured approval conditions.
Collect approval decisions over repeated search rounds.
Measure final selection quality and latency.

evaluation_metrics.name: precision of final approved set
evaluation_metrics.definition: Share of finally approved papers judged relevant by expert review.

evaluation_metrics.name: approval latency
evaluation_metrics.definition: Time required to reach a final approved paper set.

evaluation_metrics.name: researcher satisfaction score
evaluation_metrics.definition: Post-task subjective rating of workflow quality.

statistical_tests.name: independent t-test
statistical_tests.purpose: Compare approval latency across two workflow conditions.

statistical_tests.name: two-way ANOVA
statistical_tests.purpose: Estimate interaction effects between criteria structure and feedback granularity.

risks_and_limitations: small participant counts may reduce significance
domain differences may affect approval behavior
